query: SELECT id, taskId, agentName, agentRole, LENGTH(content) AS len, durationMs FROM agent_logs WHERE taskId = (SELECT MAX(taskId) FROM agent_logs WHERE status = 'done' AND LENGTH(content) > 1000) AND status = 'done' ORDER BY id ASC
